overview: A simple booking website with an AI chat agent that helps users find and reserve time slots, plus a visual 3-week calendar showing all booked and available slots.
features: AI chat agent that suggests available time slots and creates bookings automatically
3-week visual calendar showing current and upcoming bookings
Public booking — no login required, just pick a date and time
Up to 4 bookable slots per day during business hours
Admin panel to view all bookings and cancel them
